overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a sunny Los Angeles-style residential neighborhood. The character travels along palm tree-lined sidewalks, crosses an intersection with tram tracks, and passes by apartment buildings and storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with palm trees and apartment buildings

events.description: pedestrian in white shirt ahead turns and exits to the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk following a pedestrian, passing a large black and white mural

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and jeans walking ahead, then turning off to the right

two-story residential building with balconies and blue trim
row of tall palm trees lining the sidewalk edge
blue and white real estate sign with phone numbers

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit residential sidewalk lined with palm trees on the left and apartment buildings on the right. A large black and white mural is visible on a wall to the right. The character follows a pedestrian in a white shirt who eventually turns off to the right, passing a 'Now Leasing' sign in front of the beige apartment building.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with tram tracks and crosswalks

events.description: exits covered sidewalk area into open intersection with railroad crossing
traffic light changes from red to green as character approaches opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection diagonally, passing a parked white van and waiting at the traffic light

notable_agents.action: woman in white tank top crossing the street in the same direction
white RAK TRADESMEN van parked at the corner

entered.detail: white X-shaped railroad crossing sign on a pole
red octagonal stop sign below the railroad crossing sign
white commercial van with red RAK TRADESMEN lettering and tool graphics
vertical traffic signal showing red then changing to green
metal train tracks embedded in the asphalt road surface

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the sidewalk into a wide open intersection featuring railroad crossing signs and tram tracks embedded in the asphalt. A white RAK TRADESMEN van is parked on the left side. The character crosses the street with a woman in a white tank top, passing through the crosswalk as the traffic light changes from red to green.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with mixed apartment and commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, passing pedestrians walking in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red patterned shirt walking toward camera
pedestrian in gray shirt and cap walking toward camera

entered.detail: bright yellow fire hydrant on the sidewalk corner
multi-story white residential building with dark windows
storefront with 'Swell' signage and '18' building number

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the continuation of the residential sidewalk, now passing a yellow fire hydrant and approaching a white apartment building. Two pedestrians walk past in the opposite direction. The character approaches a storefront with a 'Swell' sign, continuing down the palm tree-lined street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit residential neighborhood that transitions from a narrow sidewalk into a wide urban intersection and back onto a palm-lined street. It begins by following a pedestrian in a white shirt past a large black and white mural and a leasing sign for a beige apartment building. As the character reaches the end of the block, the scene opens into a wide intersection featuring tram tracks embedded in the asphalt and a parked white tradesman van. The camera then tracks the character across the street alongside a woman in a white tank top just as the traffic light shifts to green. Finally, the view returns to a residential sidewalk, passing a yellow fire hydrant and a white apartment building before moving toward a storefront with a Swell sign.
